report.summary: Created 7 OG images for recent pages missing them, fixed OG metadata references in 4 pages (dynamic API to static SVG), and applied UX refinements to the Institutional Crypto Adoption guide (semantic nav, XP badge, arrow consistency).

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Institutional Adoption page: Changed TOC from non-semantic <div> to <nav aria-label='Table of contents'> with proper <ul>/<li> structure for screen reader accessibility
Institutional Adoption page: Added missing '+250 XP' badge to header metadata line for consistency with other learn guides (e.g. Lido V3 stVaults)
Institutional Adoption page: Standardized TOC arrow placement (label arrow instead of arrow label) to match Lido V3 pattern
Institutional Adoption page: Removed emoji from TOC header for visual consistency with other guides
Identified MPC Wallets page as client component without server-exported metadata — flagged for future refactor to split into server page + client component
Both today's new pages (Lido V3, Institutional) verified: proper breadcrumbs, gradient hero titles, reading time, category badges, TOC, FAQ sections, internal links, BackToTop component

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: btc-yield-earning-strategies-guide-2026 (1200x630, orange/amber Bitcoin theme with yield bar chart)
OG image: bitcoin-safe-haven-guide-2026 (1200x630, gold theme with shield + BTC vs Gold comparison)
OG image: fully-onchain-gaming-autonomous-worlds-guide-2026 (1200x630, purple/green with game network nodes)
OG image: mpc-wallets-guide-2026 (1200x630, indigo/cyan with key shard distribution diagram)
OG image: staking-as-a-service-providers-guide-2026 (1200x630, cyan/green with staking node network)
OG image: btcfi-yield-strategies-guide-2026 (1200x630, orange/indigo with Bitcoin DeFi connections)
OG image: depin-earning-guide-2026 (1200x630, green/purple with IoT mesh network)

sections.title: Metadata Fixes
items: btc-yield-earning-strategies-guide-2026: Updated OG image from /api/og dynamic endpoint to static SVG (openGraph + twitter)
bitcoin-safe-haven-guide-2026: Updated OG image from /api/og dynamic endpoint to static SVG (openGraph + twitter)
btcfi-yield-strategies-guide-2026: Updated 3 OG image references from hardcoded api/og URL to static SVG
depin-earning-guide-2026: Updated 3 OG image references from hardcoded api/og URL to static SVG
Created alias copies for staking-service-providers and fully-onchain-gaming OG SVGs to match existing page metadata references

sections.title: Notes for Future Cycles
items: 124 learn pages still missing dedicated OG images (using dynamic /api/og fallback or none)
MPC Wallets page (mpc-wallets-guide-2026) is a 'use client' component without exported Metadata — needs server/client split for proper SEO
Consider batch OG image generation script for remaining pages
